title: Steal a Brainrot
description: Steal a brainrot mod - Inspired by other game modes
body:
# STEAL A BRAINROT

This mod is in progress, now you have the following italian brainrots:

1. Tralalero tralala 
2. Boneca ambalabu  
3. Chimpanzini bananini  
4. Dolfinitta bananita  
5. Tun tun tun sahur  
6. Stevino zapattoni (original for this mod)   (3 variants)
7. Trulimero trulichina   (3 variants)
8. Tatatata sahur   (3 variants)
9. Lirili larila  (3 variants)
10. Ballerina capuchina 
11. Orcalero orcala 
12. Brr este eh patipum 

## Brainrot walk - Structure
This structure can spawn in your world. Here, you’ll be able to access everything this mod offers in survival mode.

How do you make a Brainrot walk to your stand?
First, you need to have a linked base. To do this, right–click on a Brainrot Console.
Next, use the Money Bag (you can find this item inside the chests of this structure) and right–click on the Brainrot you want—if you have enough money.

If the Brainrot doesn’t walk to your Brainrot Stand, make sure you have empty stands available. If there are empty stands, and it still won’t move, you can use leads to bring it closer. (When they are near your base door, they will find an empty brainrot stand that you owned)

## Quality

1. COMMON - 50% spawn chance
2. RARE - 25% spawn chance
3. VERY RARE - 12% spawn chance
4. MYTHIC - 7% spawn chance
5. LEGEND - 3.5% spawn chance
6. BRAINROT GOD - 2% spawn chance
7. ANCIENT- 0.5% spawn chance
8. FUSION- Unused

## ¿Do you want a custom brainrot variant exclusive for you?

Join my discord channel and upgrade your tier for exclusive stuff like custom skins on this mod
